title: New CD Reconstruction Anima by THE ILLUMINATI
display_title: New CD Reconstruction Anima by THE ILLUMINATI
wikitext:
[]: New CD? - Re:construction Anima by THE ILLUMINATI             Quote Post by giuliano » Tue Sep 08, 2009 11:31 am Whilst checking CDJapan I came across a new 'Cover' CD for Evangelion... anyone heard anything about this ? http://www.cdjapan.co.jp/detailview.html?KEY=PREGET-5

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Tue Sep 22, 2009 2:48 pm http://www.neowing.co.jp/track_for_cdj.html?KEY=PREGET-5 Cover CD features anime series "Evangelion." 大ヒット・アルバム「ジブリ・スピード」でお馴染みPiano Masterが、別名儀・THE ILLUMINATIとして「エヴァンゲリオン」で使用された楽曲を、最新曲も含めフルアレンジ。2009年夏、劇場版第2作目の公開などで、2000年以降も依然人気の「エヴァ」カバーは、マスト・アイテム。 * Tracklisting 1. kanon-D-Dur 2. The Beast II 3. 心よ原始に戻れ (Kokoro yo genshi ni modore) 4. FLY ME TO THE MOON 5. 主よ、人の望みの喜びよ (Jesu, joy of man's desiring) 6. 次回予告 (Next episode) 7. 残酷な天使のテーゼ (cruel angel's thesis) 8. 魂のルフラン (soul refain) 9. Thanatos -if I can't Be Yours 10. 甘き死よ、来たれ (komm suesser todd) 11. 集結の園へ (Shuuketsu no en? shuuketsu no sono? marching soldiers' garden? I have no idea, probably this is the obligatory "original piece" on this arrange album) sounds like a hitlist. I was hoping for more BGM arranges, but I want to hear an arrange of The Beast II.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Sep 22, 2009 3:11 pm Ooh, interesting! Does anyone know what style of music (if any) The Illuminati are known for, or what style (if any single style) this CD is done in?

[]:             Quote Post by brainissues » Tue Sep 22, 2009 5:19 pm THE ILLUMINATI , that's so original...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Sep 22, 2009 6:45 pm FallenTabris: I think track 11 is one of Megumi Hayashibara's new songs: Into the Garden of Gathering.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Sep 22, 2009 10:03 pm brainissues wrote: THE ILLUMINATI , that's so original...
